title: dysoxylum mollissimum var. glaberrimum
intro: Dysoxylum mollissimum var. glaberrimum, also known as the 'glaberrimum' variety of Dysoxylum mollissimum, is a plant species within the family Meliaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Dysoxylum mollissimum var. glaberrimum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in some Asian cultures.
